author: audit-agent

patch.value: Re-audit successor to pm-5zkg. Covers phases 0-9 with live remote infra included.
End-to-end re-audit from scratch: dogfood, code review, SDK/extensibility, search/vector, calendar, CI/CD, telemetry/Sentry client, live remote infra analysis. Security/privacy hard gate enforced.
All phases 0-9 executed with verified evidence. Security gate passes. All findings tracked as pm items. Full test suite green.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10 (0 active); pm list-open --limit 20 (0); pm list-in-progress --limit 20 (0); pm search re-audit 2026.5 comprehensive --limit 10 (all closed). Net-new scope: full from-scratch re-audit with live infra.

message: Create re-audit epic after duplicate check: 0 open/in-progress items, pm-5zkg closed

author: audit-agent

patch.value: Full PM CLI re-audit completed. All 8 child items closed with verified evidence across 9 phases: governance bootstrap, security gate (zero leaks), dogfood E2E (full lifecycle), code quality (1063-line main.ts, no dead code), SDK (70+ exports), search (keyword/semantic/hybrid all <2.5s), calendar (all views working), CI/CD+telemetry+Sentry (hardened workflows, 27 targeted tests), live infra (9 containers healthy, 34981 events, 0 Sentry issues). Analysis toolkit deployed to scripts/prod/telemetry/.

message: Close re-audit epic with full evidence
